is_synthetic.description: Whether data is generated synthetically from Omniverse or not.
is_synthetic.title: is synthetic

merge_only.description: Whether to merge only per sequence pkl without generating per seuqence pkl.
merge_only.title: merge only

mode.description: Data mode to generate output pkl file
mode.title: data convert mode

output_prefix.description: Output prefix to append for output pkl file.
output_prefix.title: output prefix

per_sequence.description: Whether to save results in per sequence format.
per_sequence.title: is per sequence

results_dir.description: A directory to save data convert output.
results_dir.title: results directory

root_dir.description: A path to the root directory of the given dataset.
root_dir.title: root directory of the dataset

sequence_list.description: Sequence list to process per sequence.
sequence_list.title: sequence list

with_plane.description: Whether to use plane data from kitti.
with_plane.title: is with plane
